homepage.heroSubline: Powering Omaha homes and businesses for over a decade. Get reliable electrical solutions, guaranteed.
aboutText: Bruce Kutler Electric started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable electrical services to our neighbors in Omaha. From fixing a flickering light to wiring a new home, we treat every project with the same dedication and attention to detail.

We believe in clear communication, upfront pricing, and doing the job right the first time. Our team is comprised of licensed, experienced electricians who are committed to exceeding your expectations. We prioritize safety and quality in every aspect of our work.

As a locally owned and operated business, we're invested in the Omaha community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible and ethical company. When you choose Bruce Kutler Electric, you're supporting a local business that cares.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Licensed and highly trained electricians with years of experience in the Omaha area.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. Get a clear and detailed estimate before we start any work.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to handle urgent issues.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Bruce Kutler Electric today for fast, reliable service. Get a free quote now!

services.name: Electrical Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable electrical repair services for Omaha homes and businesses.
services.description:
From flickering lights and faulty outlets to sparking wires and tripped breakers, electrical problems can be frustrating and dangerous. Bruce Kutler Electric provides comprehensive electrical repair services to address any issue, big or small. We understand the urgency of electrical problems, especially given Omaha's severe weather patterns that can exacerbate existing issues. Our experienced electricians will diagnose the problem accurately and provide efficient, effective repairs to restore safety and functionality to your electrical system.

We handle all types of electrical repairs, including outlet and switch replacements, wiring repairs, circuit breaker replacements, lighting repairs, and more. We use only high-quality materials and follow all safety codes to ensure lasting results. We also offer 24/7 emergency repair services for urgent situations that require immediate attention, particularly during severe weather events common in Omaha.

Don't let electrical problems disrupt your life or put your home at risk. Contact Bruce Kutler Electric today for prompt and professional electrical repair services. We'll get your electrical system back in top shape, ensuring the safety and comfort of your home or business.
process: Step 1: Contact us to describe the electrical issue you're experiencing.
Step 2: We'll schedule a convenient appointment for an electrician to assess the problem.
Step 3: Our electrician will diagnose the issue and provide a detailed estimate for the repair.
Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repair efficiently and safely.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to respond to urgent calls as quickly as possible, often within the hour, depending on your location in Omaha and our current workload.

faq.question: What are the signs that I need electrical repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripped breakers, sparking outlets, burning smells, and loose outlets. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to call a qualified electrician immediately.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection. We adhere to the highest safety standards and regulations.

services.name: Electrical Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional electrical installation services for new construction and remodeling projects.
services.description:
Whether you're building a new home in a growing Omaha suburb or remodeling your existing Dundee bungalow, proper electrical installation is crucial for safety, functionality, and code compliance. Bruce Kutler Electric provides comprehensive electrical installation services for residential and commercial properties. We work closely with homeowners, builders, and contractors to ensure that your electrical system meets your specific needs and adheres to all local regulations.

Our electrical installation services include wiring new homes, installing lighting fixtures, adding outlets and switches, upgrading electrical panels, installing dedicated circuits for appliances, and more. We use only high-quality materials and follow best practices to ensure lasting performance and safety. We understand the unique challenges posed by Omaha's climate, including the need for robust grounding systems to protect against lightning strikes during severe thunderstorms.

From planning and design to installation and inspection, Bruce Kutler Electric is your trusted partner for all your electrical installation needs. We'll ensure that your electrical system is safe, efficient, and ready to handle the demands of modern living.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation needs and project scope.
Step 2: We'll develop a detailed plan and estimate based on your requirements.
Step 3: Our experienced electricians will complete the installation efficiently and according to code.
Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly and safely.
benefits: Customized solutions to meet your specific needs
Experienced electricians with years of installation expertise

faq.question: Do I need a permit for electrical installation work?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, electrical installation work requires a permit from the City of Omaha. We can handle the permit application process for you to ensure compliance with local regulations.

faq.question: How long will the electrical installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of the installation depends on the scope and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a realistic timeline during the planning phase.

faq.question: Can you install energy-efficient lighting?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer a wide range of energy-efficient lighting options, including LED fixtures, that can help you save money on your energy bills and reduce your carbon footprint.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrade
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for increased safety and capacity.
services.description:
An outdated or overloaded electrical panel can pose a significant safety hazard to your Omaha home. If your breakers are constantly tripping, you're planning to add new appliances, or your panel is more than 25 years old, it's time for an electrical panel upgrade. Bruce Kutler Electric provides professional electrical panel upgrade services to ensure that your electrical system can safely and reliably handle your power demands.

We'll assess your current electrical panel and determine the appropriate size and type of panel to meet your needs. We'll then remove your old panel and install a new, code-compliant panel with adequate capacity for your home or business. We understand the importance of proper grounding, especially in Omaha, where lightning strikes are common during summer storms. Our upgrades include surge protection to safeguard your valuable electronics from power surges.

Upgrading your electrical panel not only improves safety but also increases the value of your property. Contact Bruce Kutler Electric today to schedule a consultation and learn more about the benefits of an electrical panel upgrade.
process: Step 1: We'll assess your current electrical panel and power needs.
Step 2: We'll recommend the appropriate panel upgrade and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: We'll obtain the necessary permits and schedule the upgrade.
Step 4: Our electricians will safely remove your old panel and install the new one.

faq.question: How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Common signs include frequently tripping breakers, flickering lights, burning smells, and an outdated panel (over 25 years old).

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: The upgrade typically takes one day to complete, but it may vary depending on the complexity of the installation.

faq.question: Will I need to turn off the power during the upgrade?
faq.answer: Yes, we will need to temporarily turn off the power to your home during the upgrade. We'll minimize the downtime as much as possible.

services.name: Lighting Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home with professional lighting installation services.
services.description:
Proper lighting can transform the look and feel of your Omaha home, enhancing its beauty, functionality, and security. Bruce Kutler Electric provides professional lighting installation services for both interior and exterior spaces. Whether you're looking to install recessed lighting in your kitchen, add landscape lighting to your backyard, or upgrade your existing fixtures to energy-efficient LEDs, we can help.

We offer a wide range of lighting options to suit your style and budget, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, chandeliers, track lighting, landscape lighting, security lighting, and more. We'll work with you to design a lighting plan that meets your specific needs and preferences, taking into account the unique characteristics of your home and the local environment. Omaha's diverse architecture demands lighting that complements each home's unique style.

Our experienced electricians will ensure that your lighting is installed safely and correctly, following all codes and regulations. We'll also handle the wiring and electrical work, ensuring that your lighting system is reliable and energy-efficient. Upgrade your home with beautiful and functional lighting from Bruce Kutler Electric.
process: Step 1: Consult with us to discuss your lighting needs and preferences.
Step 2: We'll develop a customized lighting plan and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: Our electricians will install your new lighting fixtures safely and efficiently.
Step 4: We'll test the lighting system to ensure everything is working properly.

faq.question: What types of lighting fixtures do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide range of lighting fixtures, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, chandeliers, track lighting, landscape lighting, and security lighting.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right lighting for my home?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide expert advice and guidance to help you choose the right lighting fixtures and design a lighting plan that meets your specific needs and preferences.

faq.question: How much does lighting installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of lighting installation varies depending on the scope of the project, the type of fixtures, and the wiring requirements. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate before we start any work.

services.name: Smart Home Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade to a smarter home with professional smart home device and system installation.
services.description:
Transform your Omaha residence into a smart home with Bruce Kutler Electric's expert installation services. We specialize in integrating smart technology seamlessly into your home, providing convenience, energy efficiency, and enhanced security. From smart lighting and thermostats to automated security systems and whole-home audio, we can design and install a customized smart home solution that fits your lifestyle. Considering Omaha's varying temperatures, smart thermostats can provide considerable savings. 

Our services include the installation and configuration of smart lighting systems (allowing for remote control and dimming), smart thermostats (for automated temperature control and energy savings), smart security systems (including cameras, doorbells, and alarms), smart entertainment systems, and more. We ensure that all devices are properly connected and integrated, providing a user-friendly experience. We also provide ongoing support and maintenance to keep your smart home running smoothly.

Experience the convenience and benefits of a smart home with Bruce Kutler Electric. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our smart home installation services.
process: Step 1: Consultation to assess your smart home needs and preferences.
Step 2: Design a customized smart home solution and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: Install and configure smart devices and systems.
Step 4: Provide training and support to ensure you can easily use your new smart home features.
benefits: Enhanced convenience and control over your home
Increased energy efficiency and cost savings
Improved home security and peace of mind
Seamless integration of smart devices and systems

faq.question: What smart home devices can you install?
faq.answer: We can install a wide range of smart home devices, including smart lighting, thermostats, security systems, entertainment systems, and more.

faq.question: How much does smart home installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of smart home installation varies depending on the scope of the project and the number of devices installed. We'll provide you with a detailed estimate before we start any work.

faq.question: Do I need to have a specific internet provider for smart home devices?
faq.answer: Most smart home devices require a reliable internet connection. We can advise you on the best internet options for your needs.

services.name: Generator Installation
services.shortDescription: Ensure reliable backup power with professional generator installation services.
services.description:
Given Omaha's susceptibility to severe weather events, including blizzards and thunderstorms, having a reliable backup generator is essential for maintaining power during outages. Bruce Kutler Electric provides professional generator installation services to ensure that your home or business remains powered during emergencies. We offer a range of generator options, including portable generators and whole-house backup generators, to meet your specific needs and budget.

Our services include assessing your power requirements, selecting the appropriate generator size and type, installing the generator according to code, and providing ongoing maintenance and support. We ensure that your generator is properly connected to your electrical system and that it's ready to automatically kick in when the power goes out. We also handle all necessary permits and inspections.

Don't be left in the dark during the next power outage. Contact Bruce Kutler Electric today to learn more about our generator installation services and ensure reliable backup power for your home or business.
process: Step 1: Assess your power requirements and recommend the appropriate generator size and type.
Step 2: Obtain the necessary permits and schedule the installation.
Step 3: Install the generator according to code and connect it to your electrical system.
Step 4: Test the generator to ensure it's working properly and provide ongoing maintenance and support.
benefits: Peace of mind knowing your home or business will remain powered

faq.question: What size generator do I need?
faq.answer: The size of the generator you need depends on your power requirements. We can assess your needs and recommend the appropriate generator size.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for generator installation?
faq.answer: Yes, generator installation typically requires a permit. We can handle the permit application process for you.

faq.question: How often should I maintain my generator?
faq.answer: We recommend annual maintenance to ensure your generator is working properly and reliably.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Bruce Kutler Electric upgraded our electrical panel in our older Dundee home. The team was professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. We haven't had any tripped breakers since, even with our new appliances. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Bruce Kutler Electric to install recessed lighting in our kitchen. They did a great job, and the new lighting looks fantastic. There was a small delay due to a parts shortage, but they communicated well and kept us informed.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Our power went out during a thunderstorm, and Bruce Kutler Electric was able to come out quickly and fix the problem. The electrician was knowledgeable and courteous. We were grateful for their prompt service!

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: Bruce Kutler Electric transformed our home into a smart home. They installed smart lighting, a smart thermostat, and a security system. The installation was seamless, and they took the time to show us how to use everything. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: We had a whole-house generator installed by Bruce Kutler Electric. The installation process was smooth, and they explained everything thoroughly. It gives us peace of mind knowing we'll have power during storms.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: I had a faulty outlet in my Aksarben home that was sparking. Bruce Kutler Electric sent someone out the same day, and they quickly and safely fixed the problem. Very professional and reasonably priced.
